channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Accident causes traffic gridlock on Lagos-Ibadan Expressway
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A lone accident near Kara Bridge caused significant Lagos-Ibadan traffic gridlock. Emergency responders are clearing the scene; expect delays.
Read More: https://punchng.com/accident-causes-traffic-gridlock-on-lagos-ibadan-expressway/

item.title: DJ Chicken calls Seyi Tinubu daddy, adopts his photo after release
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Controversial content creator DJ Chicken changes his Instagram profile picture to Seyi Tinubu’s and calls him ‘daddy’ after his release from Kirikiri.
Read More: https://punchng.com/dj-chicken-calls-seyi-tinubu-daddy-adopts-his-photo-after-release/

item.title: Southampton boss Eckert charged by FA over Spygate scandal
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Southampton head coach Tonda Eckert has been charged by the FA with misconduct and potentially bringing the game into disrepute over the 'Spygate' scandal.

item.title: JUST IN: FG cuts textbook assessment fees, orders refunds for publishers
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Federal Government has reduced textbook assessment fees and ordered refunds for publishers, easing financial burdens ahead of the National Textbook Ran
Read More: https://punchng.com/just-in-fg-cuts-textbook-assessment-fees-orders-refunds-for-publishers/

item.title: NiMet, NCCC to sign MoU on climate services, data management
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
NiMet and NCCC will sign an MoU to deepen collaboration on climate services, data management, and national climate resilience initiatives in Nigeria.
Read More: https://punchng.com/nimet-nccc-to-sign-mou-on-climate-services-data-management/

item.title: Obi, Kwankwaso have no legacy to win 2027 election — Ganduje
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Abdullahi Ganduje claims Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso lack the governance records and political legacy needed to win the 2027 presidential election.
Read More: https://punchng.com/obi-kwankwaso-have-no-legacy-to-win-2027-election-ganduje/

item.title: Court adjourns trial of 5 men charged with concealing Timipre Sylva’s whereabouts
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Federal High Court in Abuja on Wednesday adjourned the trial of five men accused of failure to disclose the whereabouts of former Gov. Timipre Sylva of Bayelsa until Oct. 5. The post Court adjourns trial of 5 men charged with concealing Timipre Sylva’s whereabouts appeared first on Vanguard News

item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Frank Onyeka has expressed his delight after completing a permanent move to Championship club Coventry City, Completesports.com reports. Onyeka joined the Sky Blues from Brentford on loan from during the January transfer window with an obligation to sign permanently. The Nigeria international played

item.title: JUST IN: Federal Government Cuts Textbook Assessment Fees, Orders Refunds For Publishers
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The federal government has reduced the cost of textbook assessment and ranking under the National Textbook Ranking System and directed that publishers who paid the previous, higher assessment fees be refunded. The Nigerian Educational Research and Development Council announced the decision in a stat

item.description: Here are the players Chelsea have unveiled as their signings ahead of the 2026/2027 season under head coach Xabi Alonso. The post Chelsea FC's player signings of 2026 appeared first on NotjustOk.

item.title: FG cuts textbook assessment fees by 25% ahead of national ranking system
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Joseph Erunke, Abuja The Federal Government has reduced the fees for textbook assessment and ranking ahead of the rollout of the National Textbook Ranking System in September 2026. The move, announced by the Nigerian Educational Research and Development Council (NERDC) on Wednesday, is aimed at e

item.title: Ooni calls for peace ahead of Osun governorship election
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The Ooni of Ife, Oba Adeyeye Ogunwusi, appeals for peace and unity in Osun State ahead of the August 15 governorship election. Read his full statement.
Read More: https://punchng.com/ooni-calls-for-peace-ahead-of-osun-governorship-election/

item.title: NAHCON introduces N250m bank guarantee, stricter rules for Hajj operators
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The National Hajj Commission of Nigeria (NAHCON) has introduced new regulations for licensed private Hajj and Umrah tour operators ahead of the 2027 pilgrimage, including a mandatory N250 million bank guarantee and stricter operational requirements aimed at protecting pilgrims and improving service

item.title: ‘I’ll wear ‘Akwete’ buba, wrapper if my husband wins second term’ — Oluremi Tinubu

item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:

item.title: Meta made its own AI detection system. It should have just used Google’s
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: IIn March, Meta's Oversight Board called on the company to "meet its public commitments and employ its own tools" to help quell the spread of deceptive generative AI content across platforms. Meta responded in July by introducing Content Seal - an invisible watermarking technology that flags images

item.title: The 2026 Honda Prelude is a marvel of hybrid technology
item.dc:creator: The Verge
item.description: When it comes to enthusiast-geared Honda hardware, the Civic Si, Civic Type R, and Acura NSX often come to mind first for their revvy VTEC (Honda's form of variable valve timing) engines and playful chassis dynamics. The Prelude, on the other hand, less so. Instead, the Prelude is a technological st

item.title: EU blacklist: 20 years of pressure on African airlines
item.dc:creator: The Africa Report
item.description: Two decades after it was set up, the European Union’s ‘blacklist’ has reshaped African aviation from top to bottom. Safety standards have moved forward, yet more than half the airlines barred from flying in Europe are still African.

item.title: NUC approves 24 new programmes for KWASU
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The National Universities Commission (NUC) has approved the full-time take-off of new programmes at the Kwara State University (KWASU), Malete, with effect from the 2026/2027 academic session. The approval was contained in a letter addressed to the Vice-Chancellor, Professor Shaykh-Luqman Jimoh, and

item.title: Atiku tackles Tinubu over PFIPC scandal
item.dc:creator: Ripples Nigeria
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar has taken on President Bola Tinubu over the controversy surrounding the Presidential Foreign Investment Promotion Council (PFIPC) an agency the government has described as fake. Atiku called on President Tinubu to apologise to Nigerians and resign over what he de

item.title: Governor Inuwa Yahaya Holds Maiden Interactive Session With Newly Inaugurated Executive Council Members
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Gombe State Governor, Muhammadu Inuwa Yahaya, CON, earlier today held his first interactive session with the newly inaugurated members of the State Executive Council. The meeting held at the Council Chamber of the Government House where the Governor congratulated the commissioners on their appointme

item.title: Another Smart School Ready For Commissioning In Abia
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: From Ubakala in Umuahia South Local Government Areas, Governor Alex Otti of Abia State has move to Umuomaiukwu community in Isialangwa North LGA to commission another Smart School. The newly built state-of -the-art digital driven basic education facility, according to the Abia State Commissioner fo

item.title: Peller: How prison saved me from death weeks to my wedding
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “I was supposed to be in Sam Larry’s car the day he had the car accident because we planned to go see someone in a hotel that day, but I was in prison,” he said.

item.title: South Africa inflation rises to 5.0% in June as rate hike bets strengthen
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: South Africa’s annual consumer inflation rose to 5.0% in June 2026 from 4.5% in May, strengthening expectations that the country’s central bank could consider raising interest rates as price pressures persist. The post South Africa inflation rises to 5.0% in June as rate hike bets strengthen appeare

item.title: Oyo 2027: As Adekanmbi pokes APC, opposition through ‘Thank You Tour’
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: From Ibadan to Ogbomoso, Oyo and Oke-Ogun, and Ibarapa, Hon. Bimbo Adekanmbi, the governorship candidate of the Allied People’s Movement (APM) in Oyo State has embarked on a ‘Thank You Tour’ which is proving to unite the fronts ahead of the flag-off of the campaigns in the Pacesetter State, writes B

item.title: Stumbling Stock Rally Looks to Earnings for Second Half Boost
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Investors who spent weeks watching US stocks go nowhere are pinning their hopes for a breakout on a key pillar of the four-year bull run: corporate earnings.
